pendingFeedback.text: 2 significant issues: (1) WatcherService.start() resource leak — overwrites this.watcher without closing the old one; list-projects calls startWatching on every invocation, accumulating chokidar watchers. Fix: call this.watcher?.close() at start of start(). (2) sandbox: false set unnecessarily in main/index.ts — preload only uses contextBridge + ipcRenderer, available in sandboxed mode; remove sandbox: false to restore Electron 20+ default sandbox. 4 minor issues: missing uncommittedFiles: [] in two failed/computing GitState literals in App.tsx; lastKnown fallback unimplemented; removeStateWatch never called for deleted projects; window.api type duplicated locally in App.tsx instead of importing DashboardAPI from preload.
